title: Filter by connect-boards column not available on mobile?

posts.author: FredW (Frederik Wongel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,
a colleague using the mobile app made me aware of the following problem:
When setting up a filter on the mobile app, you can select the column which you want to filter by. However, if a board has a connect-boards column, it isn’t shown as one of the columns you can filter by. In The Monday Desktop app or the Browser-based Version this is possible.
Is this a limitation of the mobile app or are we doing something wrong?
Kind Regards,
Fred

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi@FredW ,
It is currently not possible to filter a board by a Connect Boards column on the Monday mobile app. This is a known limitation of the mobile app

In the meantime, you can filter a board by a Connect Boards column on the Monday desktop app or the browser-based version. To do this, simply click the Filter icon next to the column name and select the Connect Boards column from the list. You can then select the criteria for your filter.
